reviews.title: GREAT BUY!
reviews.text:
I had purchased an ergonomic mouse prior to this one. It was rechargeable as well and died less than an hour after lite use. It was not very comfortable and felt cheap. When i received this one I was skeptical because it did feel lite weight and I worried it would be cheap quality. It is comfortable & light weight, rechargeable long lasting charge. I use it for work it lasts all day and since I work from home I used it at night as well without needing a recharge until bed time. I have switched to regular mouse a couple times when i forgot to charge mine and there is a huge difference in comfort. I have a hand injury and when i use a regular mouse my hand hurts, after using this one I see a big difference when I have had to switch back. Highly recommend.

** update: i’ve now had this for several months and I have actually ordered another one which I haven’t had to take out of the box. I honestly ordered it because I lost the charging cord to my first one which I rarely use. I think I charge this mouse maybe once a week if that and I use it up to 15 hours a day with work and it never dies.

reviews.title: Love this mouse!
reviews.text: This is the 3rd one so I can have 2 at work in case I forget to charge it I have a backup and 1 at home.  The buttons aren't as quiet on this one and it's not that pretty shiny purple as pictured but if you're an Admin Asst like me you will love it! It took away my shoulder and wrist pain.

How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

reviews.title: Good but wanted more features
reviews.text:
I bought this in a time crunch. My wired mouse was getting hard to use because the scroll wheel had shifted out of place. I had several wireless mice around, but none of them still had their wireless receiver. And they were before the days of Bluetooth. So, I had was in the market for a new one.

This one is nice. It fits the hand well and all. But, I realized that it did not have the features that I was used to. First, it is not a quiet mouse. I did not notice at first, but when it penetrated my fog of concentration, I could not unhear it. Click. Click. Click! And, this was not great for conference calls either.

The other issue was that it tracked slower than I would like. I was still using my wired mouse at this point, so I did not want to change mouse settings via software. I really missed having a dpi button on my mouse. This is important to me as I use a laptop on an extended display to a 2nd monitor. So, I need to be able to zip from one end of the screen the other - quick enough to unmute and answer a question during a conference call.

Have to click to wake up the mouse kept catching my attention - which means it was on it's way to annoying me... I have worked with computers for so long, it's like an extension of me. It needs to be intuitive to use and not interrupt my flow.

And, at this point, I figured out that I would need to use two different computers at once. And, while I could pair this wireless mouse with a wired one, the USB ports required were a challenge. My newer computer has no USB C ports at all. So, this limited my set-up options. Secondly, I now had 2 mice crowding limited desk space.

So, I learned that there was such a thing as multi-device mice. And, I found one that can switch between two computers and a iPad - with a simple LED indicator so that you know which device you are controlling. I bought the also designed to be silent and to switch between different dpi. All these features and it was only $3 more.

This is what I bought to replace this one - Arteck Multi-Device Wireless Bluetooth Mouse with Nano USB Receiver Ergonomic Right Hand Silent Clicking for Computer Desktop PC Laptop Mac iPad and Windows 10/8 iPad OS Build in Rechargeable Battery

So, to sum it up, I would say that I need the speed and responsiveness of a gamer's mouse with the silent clicks and 3 device connects like an office worker. So, this mouse is ok. But, if you are an advance or intense user, you may find that it does meet your needs.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text:
The factory feet on my mouse were leaving dark spots on my light colored desk at work.
These fit great and have noticeably lower friction than the worn factory pads. The adhesive is strong but repositionable if you don't get it right first time.
When the old pads are removed, they can split into separate layers, but you should be able to get down to the bare plastic if you take care to grab the lowest layer of clear adhesive.

title: ROCCAT Kone XP Air – Wireless Customizable Ergonomic RGB Gaming Mouse, 19K DPI Optical Sensor, 100-hour Battery & Charging Dock, 29 Programmable Inputs & AIMO RGB Lighting, 4D Wheel – Black
description: The ROCCAT Kone XP Air Wireless Ergonomic RGB Gaming Mouse is designed to put the functionality of actions and macros at your fingertips. Perfected through years of refinement, this mouse is equipped with 10 dedicated buttons plus left, right, and vertical scroll wheel click functionality to expand into 29 programmable inputs, thanks to the Easy-Shift[+] duplicator button. Want to take this mouse on the go? Switch between 2.4GHz Stellar Wireless and Bluetooth for the ultimate in versatility. Additionally, the Kone XP Air’s Charging Dock blends beautifully into your setup and comes equipped with a USB passthrough on the front for the 2.4GHz wireless adapter. To further the immersive RGB experience, the translucent shell and Krystal 4D Wheel set the stage for the Kone XP AIR’s 5 lighting zones, creating stunning lighting effects. ROCCAT AIMO lighting technology produces vibrant RGB lighting displays right out of the box or syncs with other compatible AIMO products. The Kone XP Air packs a performance punch with ROCCAT’s Optical Titan Switches for lightspeed actuation and Owl-Eye 19K dpi optical sensor for precise movements. The heat-treated glides and a Phantom Flex charging cable to even further amplify your unrestricted gameplay, giving you the fastest, smoothest, and most precise experience possible. ERGONOMIC, MULTI-BUTTON DESIGN - Perfected through years of refinement, the beloved Kone ergonomic shape ensures comfort over long gaming sessions. Ten buttons plus 4D wheel expand into 29 programmable inputs thanks to the Easy-Shift[+] duplicator button. STELLAR WIRELESS + BLUETOOTH - Switch between gaming grade 2.4GHz STELLAR WIRELESS and Bluetooth for versatile use. Game all night with up to 100 hours of battery on a full charge. RAPID CHARGE DOCK - The stylish Rapid Charge Dock provides five hours of play time with just 10 minutes of charging. With 4 RGB lighting zones, the dock beautifully accents any desktop setup. Additionally, the 2.4GHz dongle can be plugged into the USB passthrough on the front. AIMO ILLUMINATION - The translucent shell and wheel set the stage for the Kone XP AIR’s five RGB zones, creating a stunning lighting experience. ROCCAT’s AIMO lighting technology produces vibrant RGB lighting displays right out of the box and can sync with other compatible AIMO-enabled products for an immersive lighting display. OWL-EYE OPTICAL SENSOR - Experience smooth, precise tracking thanks to ROCCAT’s Owl-Eye 19K DPI optical sensor. TITAN OPTICAL SWITCHES - ROCCAT’s Titan Optical Switches provide unprecedented speed, and incredible durability with a 100 million click life cycle offering a competitive edge game after game. PHANTOMFLEX CHARGING CABLE - Flexible and light, ROCCAT’s PhantomFlex USB-C charging cable virtually disappears during use to the point that you won't even know it's there. PTFE GLIDES - The Kone XP Air’s heat-treat
features: Refined ergonomic KONE shape
Multi-button design and 4D wheel with 29 programmable inputs
Gaming-grade 2.4GHz wireless and Bluetooth dual connectivity
Included RGB Rapid Charge Dock
Up to 100 hours of battery life

reviews.title: Super fun RGB lighting and great for Hell Let Loose
reviews.text: I wanted something with more buttons for Hell Let Loose than the Basilik V3. This mouse is ideal for those that need extra buttons for gaming as that is the primary reason you should consider it. The thumbrest is great as I think all gaming mice should have thumbrests since it’s so much better for your hand ergonomics. I have large hands and the mouse feels very good to hold and gives no fatigue. At first I though my thumb would hit the easy shift button but it didn’t so that’s another plus. I would say the left and right click buttons could be a bit wider and more ergonomic to say something like Basilik v3 which is where that mouse is a bit better but overall negligible. Of course the RGB is where the mouse really looks great, I love seeing so many fun colors move around and it looks really pretty to look at. So if you have a game you really like to play and are annoyed using your keyboard for some critical commands like in Hell Let Loose (map, team chat, squad chat, leadership chat) this is a very pretty, well designed convenient button placement mouse, I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Very nice gaming mouse
reviews.text:
This mouse is very ergonomic, has many buttons, and the software is good. I play many different games and need button profiles for them. The software is easy to use, and it is easy to associate a game/program with a profile for auto-switching when it is run.

I seem to use the buttons/profiles of gaming mice much more than some people. When I read mouse reviews, they mostly talk about the weight of it and other silly things that only first person shooter people care about. I care much more about the number/placement of extra buttons and the software used to configure the mouse.

I have several nice mice from other brands, brought down by HORRIBLE software. Logitech and Corsair make nice mice, but their software is a deal breaker. Roccat's mouse software is WONDERFUL.

I also like that the mouse has optical switches, which will last longer.

Only downsides: Not AS MANY buttons as my Roccat LEADR (started registering the dreaded double-click fault) and the software only supports 5 profiles at once. If you play more than 5 games that need a profile, you have to do the export/import dance. But this is a trivial fault.

The LEDs are a little loud, but I'm not a big LED/RGB lighting person anyway, so you can't fault the mouse. And you can turn them off (though I tend to set the colors to identify the game, so I can make sure I'm in the correct profile.)

Wonderful gaming mice that can be used for many different genres: MMO, FPS, etc.

reviews.title: upgrade from the KONE AIMO
reviews.text: I had to upgrade my previous mouse the KONE AIMO. It has a known issue with the left click which was repaired for a period of time then started acting up. I didn't lose hope in the brand however, because I absolutely love everything else about the AIMO! I play World of Warcraft and use sooo many key binds, so having a mouse like this is very helpful to my gameplay. The Kone XP is awesome. Lighter than the AIMO, similar button style but just feels smoother. Highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Dazzling and customizable...
reviews.text: that's what makes this such a fun mouse for me to use. It matches the keyboard in my home office and while I don't do PC gaming as much as I do on my laptop, this makes for a fun user experience no matter its purpose and it is highly attractive, affordable and easy to use.

title: Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
description:
Product Description
World’s Most Advanced Tracking — Go More Places Than Optical or Laser. The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets — even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
From the Manufacturer
Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
Comfortable shape
World's Most Advanced Tracking - Go More Places Than Optical or Laser
The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets - even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
BlueTrack Technology
Comfort for Either Hand
Work anywhere with the world's most advanced tracking.
Comfort and durability
Modern design and premium finish provides comfort for either hand. Symmetrical shape and unique rubber grips give you control and cushioning.
Snap in and Go
Simply snap in the transceiver for convenient on-the-go storage.
Reliable Wireless
Microsoft 2.4 ghz wireless delivers a reliable connection with up to a 30-foot range.
8-Month Battery Life
Use your mouse without power interruption for up to 8 months. The snap-in transceiver automatically turns the mouse on and off, and the led battery status indicator lets you know when replacement is needed.
What is BlueTrack?
BlueTrack Technology works on more surfaces than both optical and laser mice. It uses high-angle imaging optics to generate an accurate picture of the surface.
System Requirements

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

reviews.title: Good So Far

title: Rechargeable Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Dual Mode Slim Mute Silent Click Noiseless Portable Mobile Optical Mouse with USB Receiver Computer,3-Level Adjustable
description: LEGENDARY SOUND FROM A LEGENDARY PRODUCT The Klipsch ProMedia 2.1 was the first three-piece computer system to be THX certified, and its introduction singlehandedly raised the bar on what is defined as exceptional sound from CDs, MP3's and streaming radio.  Many have tried to copy its groundbreaking performance, but the ProMedia 2.1 still reigns supreme over anything near its price range. EXCLUSIVE HORN-LOADED TECHNOLOGY Klipsch Micro Tractrix horns make a major contribution to the Promedia 2.1's amazing proficiency.  Their highly efficient design reproduces more sound from every watt of power, controlling the dispersion of that sound and sending it straight to your ears for clarity and lifelike impact no other system can duplicate. CLEAN BASS OUTPUT AT ALL VOLUME LEVELS The two-way satellites' 3" midbass drivers blend perfectly with the Promedia 2.1's  solid, 6.5" side-firing, ported subwoofer for full bandwidth bass response you can actually feel.  With a separate subwoofer volume control, you can adjust for the best bass for what you're listening to. PERFORMANCE THAT CREATES FLEXIBILITY With its plug and play setup and convenient 3.5mm input, the Promedia 2.1 can double from anything from a TV sound enhancer to a 2.1 Home Theater system.  Its 200 watts of dynamic system power can fill even a larger room with sound.  The headphone jack allows for private listening when desired. Specifications Amplifier Power Peak Power: 200 Watts total syst...
features: Turns desktops into high-performance entertainment centers
Maximizes digital technologies such as CDs, MP3 downloads and streaming radio
Delivers amazingly crisp and clear response
Subwoofer generates deep, authoritative lows
Compatible with other devices via a headphone jack and miniplug input

reviews.title: These are great sounding computer speakers
reviews.text:
I have the Klipsch Pro Media Thx 2.1. These are great sounding computer speakers. They best the Bose Companion II which sound terrible in comparison. the Bose sound shallow and weak. These speakers have 3 1/2 inch long throw woofers for the midrange, and a real subwoofer for the lows. They are great sounding for what they are and the best computer speakers to my knowledge in the $200 or below genre.

However, they need to be tweaked. The subwoofer is slightly heavy (although an adjustment is on your speakers) and the highs are slightly bright like other Klipsch speakers, and the midrange is slightly recessed. Simply set your computer system from Windows at 70% output roughly, then pull up iTunes (if you use it) or another equalizer, and set the low bass from about 65K down about 3db below average, put the midrange from about 125K on up to about three 3DB higher than normal, then set the 1K at zero, and above that from 2K on up about 3db below zero. You can adjust that a little to make a curve

These speakers are great. I went with refurbished myself at a little over half price. Enjoy! They are great.

P.S. I am an audiophile who has a good ear and an extremely good stereo system. These do not equal that, but sound great for what they are and better than all others for $200 or less and close to the $400 plus systems.

reviews.title: Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound
reviews.text: I'm not clear what the differences are between this model and the other identically labelled model from other sellers that sell for less money. You shouldn't pay more than $120-$135 for these from what I can tell after shopping around. I bought mine in "like-new" condition for $99 with Prime free shipping and I'm ecstatic about the sound quality. Subwoofer is boomy and the sat speakers are bright. Typical Klipsch sound. Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound. I compared these to the Logitech at $105-$120. I own a pair of those too. I'm a fan of Logitech. Make that, I used to be a fan. Going to go with Klipsch if I ever have need for more speakers. These sound great. You won't be disappointed if you like the "Klipsch sound."

reviews.title: The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or ...
reviews.text: First experience with Klipsch speakers and I am thoroughly impressed! Wasn't expecting the amount of impact from the subwoofer (my previous pc came with a factory 5.1 setup and fall flat compared to these). The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or listening to music/watching videos. I was worried that a 2.1 setup would leave something to be desired vs a 5.1 setup, but I'm glad I made the jump!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect just as described

reviews.title: No better computer speaker out there
reviews.text:
There is simply no better set of computer speakers out there. The subwoofer rivals those home theater setups as well. I have this in my office connected to a Mac Mini which I often use for iTunes and watching movies, and recording to Garageband.

I have never cranked the volume 100%, it's incredibly loud at 65%. Bass is very smooth and powerful.

I actually needed speakers for an outdoor wedding and actually brought these to the event, no one complained about not being able to hear the ceremony even 20 rows back.

If you can't afford a home theatre system, consider this 2.1 for your living room as well. This will surprise you.

reviews.title: Great Mouse
reviews.text:
I enjoy this mouse a lot, I like that it is Bluetooth. I mainly got it because I love the colors and it matches everything else in my room. But I found it works very well so far I have had it for a couple weeks now I work from home so it's a good addition to an at-home office set up!

There has been one time where I had to take out the battery and reinsert it because it was lagging a bit but I have had no other problems other than that!

reviews.title: Exactly what I needed
reviews.text: I was on the hunt for a purple mouse but wanted it to be quite muted. This is literally perfect! The wheel and the mouse have all held up perfectly and the sleep mode is great to not waste the batteries!

reviews.title: Great little mouse
reviews.text: I really like the size of this mouse, it works great. My only qualm about this that there isn't an on and off switch. It does goes to sleep but if a button is pushed it wakes up. I wish you could manually turn it on or off. But other than that it's good quality and I haven't had an issue.

reviews.title: Cute and affordable
reviews.text: Love the color!!! Works perfect! Thanks!

reviews.title: cheap mouse that gets the job done
reviews.text: This is a cheap mouse that gets the job done. There's no on and off button, so do know it's going to drain the battery no matter you use it or not as long as there's a battery in it. I consider myself having a pretty big hand for a woman (around 12in from thumb to my pinky when stretched), I still feel this mouse is a tad big for me that it wasn't intuitive when grabbing onto it. I also didn't like the edges/ dents for your thumb and ring finger. I now know a slimmer mouse without edges works better for me and I can't recommend this mouse unless you are looking for something less than ten.

reviews.title: Really improve the feel
reviews.text:
Before this I have never really considered changing the mouse feet. The only reason I purchased these was because I need to remove the old ones to solder in a new switch.

With the new micro switches installed. https://amzn.to/3ElgafC ( incase you are curious which ones) and the new feet this made a whole new mouse.

The feet arrived perfect no bends or wrinkles. Super easy to install. Just make sure you clean the area really good with some alcohol.

They glide so much better than stock feet. The feel is simply amazing. Now whenever I purchase a new mouse I will be upgrading the feet. If you are on the fence about it I would say go for it.

For durability I have had these on for over a month and they have no signs of wear. They still perform excellent.

Thank you for taking the time to read this and I hope that it was helpful in your purchase decision

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Poor performance | no charge indicator
reviews.text: Highly susceptible to interference. Drags and lags.

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.text: I like the size and the LED colors.  The battery life is a little lackluster and it actually starts acting up when it's "tired".  I got it for my iPad but haven't used it a month or so b/c I got tired of her attitude.

reviews.title: Had 2 of these and they both died
reviews.text: Will never buy from this company again... the second one we bought froze and would not work again.. same as the first one.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: Can’t beat this little mouse for a chromebook
reviews.text: I purchased this mouse for my daughter so she would have a lightweight mouse to use at school. It works amazing! If your child is looking for a small mouse that they can carry around at school easily, this is it.

reviews.title: A gift
reviews.text: It’s a gift to my daughter and she loves it. Vibrant color pink and it’s easy for her to use it on her laptop.

reviews.title: I SHOULD HAVE READ THE REVIEWS
reviews.text:
First off its not anywhere near purple but thats not the major issue. It arrived broken. As soon as I opened the back to look at it,it came apart! It looks like thetop is slowly working its way off. Dont know if i can return this but i sure want to. We dont have any computer stores by us so I had to get back online to find a good one and since im left handed I get to be fussy .
since finding a good one. So im going with a name ive heard of before AND CHECKING THE REVIEWS! Since i posted this ive been contacted by their customer service and i must say they

title: TECKNET Mini Wireless Mouse, 2.4GHz Small Computer Mouse with USB Receiver, 3 Adjustable DPI Portable Mouse for Kids, AA Battery Powered Travel Mouse for Laptop, PC, Mac, Chromebook-Grey
features: 【Plug and Play】No need to install any driver. Just plug the 2.4GHz USB receiver into the device to ensure powerful and reliable connection. TECKNET purple wireless mouse works perfect on a variety of surfaces, such as desktops, cloth, paper, etc. Working distance up to 33ft/10m.

【Portable & Noiseless】With the size of 2.44 x 1.42 x 4.02inches, weights only 1.87ounces, the silent mouse is easy to store in your bag. Quiet click frees you from worring about bothering others, keep you stay focused while working and studying.

【Ultra-Long Battery Life】Adopted the advanced process chips and intelligent power-saving technology, the mini wireless mouse only needs 1 AA battery (not included) to support 18 months use. Featuring auto sleep, quick wake up and long time standby this cordless mouse automatically enters sleep mode during inactivity to save power. Simply click or move the wireless travel mouse to return back to work.

【Meet Your Daily Use】TECKNET small kids mouse has adjustable DPI (1600/1200/800), provides you with 2X faster response, and perfectly adapts to a 4K/8K high-definition display, you can set different DPI according to your needs. The portable mouse is ergonomically symmetrical, satisfies both left and right handed use.

【Universal Compatibility】This laptop mouse works perfectly withWindows11/10/8/7/2003/2000/XP, Mac OS X 10.4, etc. Please note: This mouse connects via a USB receiver and is not compatible with Macbook Pro or other devices that only have a Type C port.

title: LODVIE Wireless Mouse, Computer Ergonomic Mouse 2.4G Laptop Mouse, USB Mouse, 5 Adjustable DPI Cordless Mouse with 6-Button, Portable Mouse for PC, Desktop, Windows, Mac
features: [Comfortable Holding Posture]The Ergonomic design will offer more nature posture to reduce wrist pressure and less muscle fatigue from your up body.The Axisymmetric Design will help you use wireless mouse in the right or left hand more convenient.

[Work Smoothing In Multi-Scenes]Wirelss mouse with 5 Adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600/2000/2400) satisfy your different need.The computer mouse allows for precise, quick, and smooth cursor movement wherever you are working or surfing.

[Plug & Play,Stable Connection]The usb mouse come with usb receiver(Stored in the bottom of the laptop mouse).Never need use any complicated driver,you just need plug usb receiver into your laptop/PC/Computer within 50ft/15m, wirless mouse will work instantly.Help you get rid of the bothered from power cords！

[Premium Rubber Coating]The scroll wheel and two side of computer mouse were made of premium and skin-friendly Rubber,avoid usb mouse slippery when your hand sweating.The red on the scroll wheel adding a active atmosphere in your daily work and study.

[Power Saving Mode]If your laptop mouse leave working status for 8 minutes,it will enter sleep mode auto,and you just need click any button to wake it up instantly.What‘s more, wireless mouse has through 500, 000 click test and bring you a wonderful experience.

I like everything about the mouse and the plug and play feature. Strongly recommended.

title: Wireless Mouse, 2.4Ghz Wireless Mouse Computer Mouse 1200DPI,6 Buttons with Nano Receiver for Laptop,PC,Chromebook,Computer,Notebook,Office (Grey)
description: How to connect: Step1:open the battery cover,then install the two AAA battery . Step2:Take out the USB dongle and close the battery cover . Step3:Plug the USB dongle in the USB port . Step4:Place your wireless mouse close to the dongle about 30CM,turn the power switch button to "ON", the led light will light up.Your mouse will connect with the dongle automatically and start working . Notice if the mouse doesn't work ,please place the mouse near to the dongle and press the connect button (underneath the mouse)and release ,it wll connect to work . Package details Wireless mouse x1 USB nano receiver x1
features: System support: Windows,Android/Linux office/Mac OS device.
Wireless Mouse :RF2.4G wireless transmission distance of up to 10m.
Easy operation: USB nano dongle and power switch ,more convenient when plug in USB ,Plug and Play make all the operation more easier than others.
with 800/1200 CPI switch ,press left+mid+right button for switching ,2.4Ghz wireless ,1200cpi optical technology.
Package Contents: 1x Wireless Mouse, 1x Nano Receiver,Powered by two AAA battery (not included)

reviews.title: Mouse in the house.
reviews.text: Works properly as it should, couldn’t beat the price.

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

title: Redragon K556 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard M612 Wired Gaming Mouse Bundle
features: This bundle includes a K556 gaming keyboard and a M612 Mouse.

K556 Keyboard: The mechanical brown switch offers the best tactile typing experience, also being ever so slightly quieter, fitting for office or gaming use. And you will get 8 spared switches as a gift.

K556 Keyboard: RGB LED adjustable lighting with 6-themed backlights -18 lighting models. You can also adjust their brightness with FN+“↑”and“↓” Besides, there is a 9-color single backlit mode for this keyboard.

M612 Mouse: Pentakill, 5 DPI Levels - Geared with 5 redefinable DPI levels (default as: 500/1000/2000/3000/4000), easy to switch between different game needs. Dedicated demand of DPI options between 500-8000 is also available to be processed by software.

M612 Mouse: Any Button is Reassignable - 11 programmable buttons are all editable with customizable tactical keybinds in whatever game or work you are engaging. 1 rapid fire + 2 side macro buttons offer you a better gaming and working experience.

reviews.title: Small kickstands
reviews.text: The kickstands or keyboard legs are short so even when they are up, keyboard still feels pretty small. Other than that, really good keyboard.
